Video.summary: Can our budget build rival a new Lexus?
Video.title: The Perfect Project Car?

Video.summary: In the series launch we take a 1991 Chevy Suburban and transform it into ‘Project Unbreakable.’
Video.title: Project Unbreakable

Video.summary: It’s fabrication time on our Chevy Suburban we’re calling “Unbreakable”.
Video.title: Fab Four

Video.summary: Our GMC “Unbreakable” Suburban gets its new suspension.
Video.title: Suburban Suspension

Video.summary: Our “Unbreakable” Suburban gets its engine and transmission.
Video.title: Unbreakable Nears The Finish

Video.summary: We introduce our Low-Fi S-10 project and look at the history of the Mini Truck Slam world.
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: The Hunt For A New Project

Image.alt: Low-Fi S-10: The Hunt For A New Project
Low-Fi S-10: The Hunt For A New Project
Low-Fi S-10: The Hunt For A New Project

Video.summary: We tear into our Low-Fi S-10 project and the rear suspension is our focus.
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: We Lay Frame

Video.summary: Our Chevy Low-Fi S-10 project continues and today is front suspension teardown and upgrades
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: Altering The Front Suspension

Image.alt: Low-Fi S-10: Altering The Front Suspension
Low-Fi S-10: Altering The Front Suspension
Low-Fi S-10: Altering The Front Suspension

Video.summary: We send our S-10 out to an expert who will create and install a custom audio system and interior.
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: New Audio System & Interior

Image.alt: Low-Fi S-10: New Audio System & Interior
Low-Fi S-10: New Audio System & Interior
Low-Fi S-10: New Audio System & Interior

Video.summary: We are on the home stretch of our ’95 Chevy S-10 Mini Slam Project.
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: This Project is Coming Together

Image.alt: Low-Fi S-10: This Project is Coming Together
Low-Fi S-10: This Project is Coming Together
Low-Fi S-10: This Project is Coming Together

Video.summary: The final touches are added to our ’95 Chevy S-10 Mini Truck project.
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: We Wrap Up and Lay Frame!

Image.alt: Low-Fi S-10: We Wrap Up and Lay Frame!
Low-Fi S-10: We Wrap Up and Lay Frame!
Low-Fi S-10: We Wrap Up and Lay Frame!

Video.summary: Is custom exhaust worth it on a budget build?
Video.title: Tune & Tone

Video.summary: We’re at Stovalls collision and wrecking service searching for a 4 wheel drive square body.
Video.title: How To Choose A Square Body

Image.alt: How To Choose A Square Body
How To Choose A Square Body
How To Choose A Square Body

Video.summary: What started as a simple “aerosol overhaul” gets more complicated!
Video.title: AMC-Powered Postal Jeep

Video.summary: Brian and Jason unbox a budget 2011 Lexus IS 250 body kit from China. Will it fit or need cutting?
Video.title: Body Kit Bolt Ons

Video.summary: It's time for the finishing touches on the Monte Carlo G-Machine.
Video.title: 70 Monte Carlo Finale

Video.summary: A '78 Postal Jeep gets a second chance.
Video.title: Special Delivery

Video.summary: Our '78 Postal Jeep gets an upgraded suspension that can handle the trails.
Video.title: Junk Mail Suspension

Video.summary: We start the reassembly of our '78 Postal Jeep.
Video.title: Mail Jeep Resurrection

Video.summary: The guys make room on Junk Mail for bigger wheels and tires.
Video.title: Junk Mail Body Mods

Video.summary: We start the final push getting Junk Mail one step closer to the trail.
Video.title: Junk Mail Cooling and Fuel Plumbing

Image.alt: Junk Mail Cooling and Fuel Plumbing
Junk Mail Cooling and Fuel Plumbing
Junk Mail Cooling and Fuel Plumbing

Video.summary: Our '78 Postal Jeep gets the interior buttoned up adding shifters and seats.
Video.title: Junk Mail Wrap Up and Payoff

Image.alt: Junk Mail Wrap Up and Payoff
Junk Mail Wrap Up and Payoff
Junk Mail Wrap Up and Payoff

Video.summary: We bring Project Junk Mail back into the shop to address some trail problems.
Video.title: EFI Swap Lets Junk Mail DJ5 Conquer the Trails

Image.alt: EFI Swap Lets Junk Mail DJ5 Conquer the Trails
EFI Swap Lets Junk Mail DJ5 Conquer the Trails
EFI Swap Lets Junk Mail DJ5 Conquer the Trails

Video.summary: The Tech team picks up a new project, a 1974 Ford F-100 and bring it back to the shop for a quick inspection.
Video.title: F-100 Purchase and Baseline

Video.summary: The 1974 F-100 is back in the shop for its first round of upgrades.
Video.title: F-100 Stage One Suspension

Video.summary: Watch the transformation as Tommy and Joel from Detroit Muscle roll an '83 Hurst Olds into the shop.
Video.title: Hurst Olds

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle crew rescues a familiar green 1971 Chevy Caprice.
Video.title: Driveway Rescue - 1971 Chevy Caprice

Video.summary: We kick off a new project, a 1971 Chevy Caprice, by searching through a big-body boneyard.
Video.title: Fat Stack Caprice – Part 1

Video.summary: We mock, swap, and drop in a new transmission to handle all the power we’re adding to our Caprice.
Video.title: Fat Stack Caprice – Part 2

Video.summary: Tommy and Joel visit the powder room to freshen up the frame on Fat Stack, a 1971 Chevy Caprice.
Video.title: Fat Stack Caprice – Part 3

Video.summary: We make repairs on Fat Stack, a 1971 Chevy Caprice, showing you how to remove rust and pull dents.
Video.title: Fat Stack Caprice – Part 4

Video.summary: A fresh coat of paint helps transform our Chevy Caprice into a not-so-lean, mean, green machine!
Video.title: Fat Stack Caprice – Part 5

Video.summary: A marriage made in heaven – Our Fat Stack Caprice gets reunited with our updated chassis.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack – Part 6

Video.summary: Chrome is where the heart is – Tommy and Joel update the bright work on their ‘71 Chevy Caprice.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack – Part 7

Video.summary: We begin to piece our ‘71 Caprice Fat Stack back together, installing glass, hood, and body panels.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack – Part 8

Video.summary: We install the cooling system on our ’71 Caprice and then put the pedal to the metal.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack – Part 9

Video.summary: We restore the heater box on Fat Stack, and install air conditioning components to make it cool.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack– Part 10 A/C Conversion

Image.alt: Project Fat Stack– Part 10 A/C Conversion
Project Fat Stack– Part 10 A/C Conversion
Project Fat Stack– Part 10 A/C Conversion

Video.summary: The guys finalize Fat Stack’s transformation from automatic to manual.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack – Part 11

Video.summary: Tommy and Joel cut a rug and freshen up Fat Stack’s interior to match the flashy exterior.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack – Part 12

Video.summary: The finish line is in sight for Fat Stack with finishing touches and a one-of-a-kind grille.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack – Part 13

Video.summary: Our 1971 Chevy Caprice, Project Fat Stack, ROARS to life after almost a year of work.
Video.title: Fat Stack – Part 14: Clean, Mean, and Candy Green

Image.alt: Fat Stack – Part 14: Clean, Mean, and Candy Green
Fat Stack – Part 14: Clean, Mean, and Candy Green
Fat Stack – Part 14: Clean, Mean, and Candy Green

Video.summary: Our GM long block gets a big blower and a versatile EFI setup.
Video.title: Supercharged Stroker LS3

Video.summary: What do you get when you combine a Bug and a UTV? The answer: BajAwesome.
Video.title: Beetle to BajAwesome

Video.summary: We add a custom fit roll cage, fabricated louvers, and a bunch of style points to this baja style bug.
Video.title: Baja Makeover

Video.summary: Baja Style bug gets a 80's retro style paint job to go along with a long travel suspension.
Video.title: Retro Baja Bug

Video.summary: The engine goes back together in the '74 Ford as the guys hope to improve power of this weak 351 Windsor. New rubber, rims and custom exhaust will wrap up Stage 1.
Video.title: F100 Stage 1 Wrap-Up

Video.summary: We take the freshened-up Ford and slap her back on the chassis dyno.
Video.title: '74 Ford F100 Payoff
